name: Siege Ballista
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — a war engine that flattens whatever it lands on. Reskin of the Operator; the siege engine is the catapult and the Boulder is the Mortar token. Note: Mage Knight: Resurrection has no dedicated war-machine sculpt, so use a heavy ranged attacker as a stand-in or proxy a catapult. Source: minisgallery.com.

specialAction.name: Bombardment
specialAction.summary: Bring the siege engine to the Battlefield edge nearest the crew, aimed any way. Load the Boulder and loose it. Every Unit within range — friend and foe — takes Wounds equal to the side the Boulder landed on. No valid target needed.

effects.text: The siege engine does not require a valid target.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, move 1 Wound from one Unit's card onto any other Unit in play (including an enemy).

figureCandidates.name: Technoshocker
figureCandidates.roleFit: Heavy ranged attacker — closest stand-in for an artillery piece in this set.
